PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-20-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ryotaro Hirota appeared by zoom in propria persona.

Mr. Hirota stated that the estimated value of the estate is $250,000.00 if not more, that there are some safe deposit boxes and an ameritrade account, and that he does not have the details as of yet. Mr. Hirota also stated that Kyle and Casey are the children of Eileen the older sister of the decedent who passed away a number of years ago. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated August 7, 2008 is admitted to probate. Ryotaro Hirota is appointed as the personal representative of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for May 6, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Karen Ann Simons is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-15-2023 Continued To Mar-20-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
